role: The command-line interface layer of the ArchSpine semantic mirror system, providing the main entry point, command routing, help system, initialization logic, repository artifact management, and utility functions for CLI operations.
responsibility: Collectively, these components handle user interaction via the terminal: parsing commands, bootstrapping the runtime environment, displaying help and banners, initializing repositories, configuring document languages, managing artifact strategies, and providing UI formatting utilities.

children.role: CLI UI presentation utility for formatting language discovery results, conditional banner rendering, and configuration value parsing.
CLI command adapters for ArchSpine operations.
Configuration module defining types, constants, and a dynamic builder function for document language selection in a multilingual documentation system.
CLI help text renderer for the ArchSpine command-line interface.
Primary CLI entrypoint and command router for the ArchSpine semantic mirror system.
This directory contains the initialization and bootstrapping subsystem for the ArchSpine project.
CLI command adapter for repository artifact strategy operations (check and set) within the ArchSpine system.
